2605.01205.title: SRA: Span Representation Alignment for Large Language Model Distillation
2605.01205.paper_summary: Cross-Tokenizer Knowledge Distillation (CTKD) enables knowledge transfer between a large language model and a smaller student, even when they employ different tokenizers. While existing approaches mainly focus on token-level alignment strategies, which are often brittle and sensitive to discrepancies between tokenizers, we argue that the method of aggregating tokens into more robust representations before distillation is of equal importance. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{SRA} (\textbf{S}pan \textbf{R}epresentation \textbf{A}lignment for Large Language Model Distillation), a novel framework that reframes CTKD through the physical lens of Multi-Particle Dynamical Systems. SRA shifts the fundamental unit of alignment from tokens to robust, tokenizer-agnostic spans. We model each span as a cluster of particles and represent its state by its Center of Mass (CoM) - an attention-weighted average that captures rich semantic information. We leverage the concept of span centers of mass with attention-derived weighting to prioritize the most salient spans. In addition, we employ a geometric regularizer to preserve the structural integrity of the representation space and introduce aligned span logit distillation to enhance knowledge transfer across models. In challenging cross-architecture distillation experiments, SRA consistently and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art CTKD baselines, validating our physically-grounded approach.
2605.01205.paper_summary_zh: 跨標記器知識蒸餾 (CTKD) 使得大型語言模型與較小的學生模型之間能夠進行知識轉移，即使它們使用不同的標記器。雖然現有的方法主要集中在標記級別的對齊策略上，但這些策略往往脆弱且對標記器之間的差異敏感，我們認為在蒸餾之前將標記聚合成更穩健的表示方法同樣重要。在本文中，我們介紹了 \textbf{SRA} (\textbf{S}pan \textbf{R}epresentation \textbf{A}lignment for Large Language Model Distillation)，這是一個通過多粒子動力系統的物理視角重新框架 CTKD 的新穎框架。SRA 將對齊的基本單位從標記轉變為穩健的、與標記器無關的跨度。我們將每個跨度建模為一個粒子集群，並通過其質心 (CoM) 來表示其狀態——這是一種捕捉豐富語義信息的注意力加權平均。我們利用帶有注意力衍生加權的跨度質心概念，以優先考慮最顯著的跨度。此外，我們使用幾何正則化器來保持表示空間的結構完整性，並引入對齊的跨度邏輯蒸餾，以增強跨模型的知識轉移。在具有挑戰性的跨架構蒸餾實驗中，SRA 始終顯著超越最先進的 CTKD 基準，驗證了我們基於物理的方法。
2605.01205.author: Quoc Phong Dao et.al.
2605.01205.authors: Quoc Phong Dao, Hoang Son Nguyen, Pham Khanh Chi, Tung Nguyen, Linh Ngo Van, Nguyen Thi Ngoc Diep, Trung Le
